_provenance.source: idea-engine PROPOSAL 078 (control/outbox.md block stamped 2026-07-15T23:49:54Z, live post-ROLLOVER 003) + ideas/venture-lab/impulse-price-blanket-series-collapse-2026-07-15.md @ idea-engine main dcc0991 (landed via idea-engine PR #443, merged 2026-07-16T00:04:35Z by github-actions[bot], head 3778279)
_provenance.ground_truth: COMMITTED external constants re-verified FIRSTHAND before this fixture was written, on a public-HTTPS shallow clone of venture-lab @ 021cba9422ff838128c3af2c23e4212824173471: docs/publishing/PUBLISHING-PLAN.md section 1 royalty hard fact verbatim ('KDP pays 70% only on ebooks priced $2.99-$9.99 (inclusive) ... below $2.99 or above $9.99 pays 35%, and a per-MB delivery fee is deducted from the 70% tier'); the 26-packet blanket census reproduced exactly under the drafter's four-pattern census grammar; the two 'at any plausible volume ratio' packets (the-twelfth-cake.md:106-107, de-driekoningentaart.md:106-108 'holds unchanged in EUR'); the one fork packet (the-marmalade-post.md:93-95) with its committed Peridale '36 book series' comp and 'series read-through' channel (section 3); the sellable guide sentence (candidates/ai-novella-production-kit/guide/06-pricing-and-listing.md:9-16, 'the *procedure* transfers'); the complete 3-book Night Kiln at EN word counts exactly 16180/16192/23610 (len(split()), the wc -w rule) with committed series-matched $4.99 (the-night-kiln.md:84,145) and 4.99 EUR (de-morgendeur.md:237) and 'Book Two of a three-book series' (de-morgendeur.md:95-97). The V049 external anchor roy(0.99) = 693/2000 read at this repo's own sims/verdict-049-ku-exclusivity/REPORT.md:27. The sim itself is hermetic: it reads ONLY this fixtures.json
_provenance.harvest_observation: zero harvest anomalies; one OBSERVATION: three further packets (the-night-kiln.md, the-marginalia-society.md, the-painted-stones.md) carry variant impulse-rejection phrasings the registered grammar does not match - the blanket is if anything WIDER than the registered 26; the registered count is the match claim and reproduces exactly
_provenance.note: values copied verbatim from the registration (exact rationals as [numerator, denominator] VALUE PAIRS, compared as Fraction values with the spelling derived, never compared - the V090 session idea applied); the runner re-derives everything from scratch and must not trust the anchors - a mismatch is a first-class anomaly

royalty.delivery_fee_law: per-MB fee delta deducted from the 70% tier ONLY (plan section 1 verbatim); registered at delta = 0 for decision cells, with the signed lemma swept on the grid
royalty.v049_anchor_source: sims/verdict-049-ku-exclusivity/REPORT.md:27 @ this repo (imported, never re-derived by hand; the sim re-derives it from the tier law and must match)

series_model.K_meaning: standalone / the complete committed 3-book Night Kiln / the committed Peridale 36-book comp
series_model.funnel_law: geometric per-boundary read-through: buyers of book k+1 = r x buyers of book k; promo arm moves book 1 to p0 ONLY, books 2..K stay at the committed series price under BOTH arms; I(p1) = roy(p1) + sum_{k=2..K} r^(k-1) roy(p); m*(K, r) = I(full)/I(promo); K->inf closed form m*_inf(r) = roy(p) / ((1-r) roy(p0) + r roy(p))
series_model.model_conventions: downstream prices fixed; read-through promo-independent; buyers-only attrition (declared conventions per the idea file's Model basis; promo-degrades-read-through direction signed as bar-raising, named follow-up)

ku_mixture.law: m*_ku = ((1-beta) I_full + beta J) / ((1-beta) I_promo + beta J); decision content is the MONOTONE lemma (strictly decreasing in beta toward 1 at every J, beta = 0 recovers the sales-only bar), not any J cell

grammar_patterns: impulse pricing explicitly not recommended (35% tier)
census.grammar_note: VACANCY-derived disclosure: the registration pins the census by COUNT (26/2/1) and partial naming only; the four-pattern grammar and the exact 26-file list are recovered from the drafter's drafting script (scratchpad draft_p078.py, cited in the P078 PR body), verified firsthand at 021cba9, and disclosed here; matching is over whitespace-collapsed text; the registered COUNTS are the match claims
census.fork_pattern: book-1 promo price becomes a real

census.pinned_excerpt_rule: per vetting file, every line matching /impuls|plausible volume ratio|book-1 promo/i with a [-1, +3]-line window, whitespace-collapsed, windows joined by ' … ' - copied verbatim from venture-lab @ 021cba9; files absent from pinned_excerpts carry no such line
census.guide_pinned_excerpt: pattern for adult/literary novellas: band $3.99–$5.99 inside the platform's 70%-royalty range ($2.99–$9.99); a seasonal gift-adjacent title priced at the floor ($3.99 ≈ $2.79/sale at 70%); and the explicit rejection of $0.99 impulse pricing because dropping to the 35% tier means 70%-of-$3.99 beats 35%-of-$0.99 at any plausible volume ratio. Whatever your genre's numbers are, the *procedure* transfers: verify the band, cite it, do the tier arithmetic, write the reasoning down where the next book can reuse it.
census.word_count_rule: len(open(p).read().split()) - the wc -w rule; measured firsthand at 021cba9 (harvest-time match claims; carried constants in-sim)

f_census_anchors.bar_law: m*(1) = (tier ratio 2) x (p / p0) exactly, at every committed price

thin_cell_m3_half.note: DISCLOSED thin cell: m*(3, 1/2) = 2.0608 sits ONE grid step above the REJECT witness line m* <= 2; clause (b) survives at r in {3/4, 9/10} only

knife_edge.status: registered and EXCLUDED from decision clauses (the P070 knife-edge rule): no clause may rest on the 11/10 comparison; the finite-K ordering m*(36, 9/10) > m*_inf(9/10) IS a gate (G4), the 11/10 comparison is NOT

f_census_anchors.approve_side_witnesses: falsifiability live on both sides: at r <= 1/4 every K = 3 cell clears 3; any catalog whose series geometry stays under r*_inf = 400/899 at K -> inf keeps every bar above 2

typed_must_equal_contacts.contact_C1: Arm B ledger full-price income == Arm A closed-form full-price income at all 15 (K, r) cells
typed_must_equal_contacts.contact_C2: Arm B ledger promo income == Arm A closed-form promo income at all 15 (K, r) cells
typed_must_equal_contacts.contact_C3: Arm B ledger ratio == Arm A m*(K, r) at all 15 (K, r) cells
margin0_royalty_contacts: forbidden-band width == its own lower edge exactly (2093/2000 == 2093/2000)
typed_must_equal_contacts.r_independence_contact: m*(1, r) == the standalone bar at EVERY grid r (r-free)

arm_r.draw_order_grammar: REGISTERED (fixture line, the V089 lesson, applied by the drafter): for reader i = 0..N-1 ascending, for boundary k = 2..K ascending, draw exactly ONE uniform u = rng.random(); the reader continues to book k iff u < float(r), else break; no other draws are made; one random.Random(seed) per trace; the aux seed is never read
arm_r.seed_gap_disclosed: 20261694-699 is the disclosed in-flight buffer; 20261690-693 are P077/V090's registered set
arm_r.accumulation_convention: VACANCY-derived disclosure: the grammar pins the DRAW order, not the income accumulation; the drafting convention is float(roy(series_price)) added per purchased book in reader order, round(total, 2) at the end - disclosed here and checked against the three registered previews; the promo-arm cohort value per seed is UNDISCLOSED in the registration (reported here as a vacancy, derived from the same trace with book 1 at p0, zero extra draws)
arm_r.reporting_sanity: G6: previews within 2% of the exact cohort mean - a reporting-sanity gate; NO statistical gate touches any decision

decision_rule.REJECT: the catalog-wide blanket (scope defect, not sentence defect) iff ALL of: (a) standalone home ground real - m*(1) >= 6 at every committed price pair (266/33, 998/99, 598/99); (b) series collapse - m*(3, r) <= 2 for at least one r in the registered grid at the committed $4.99; (c) comp-scale collapse - m*(36, 3/4) <= 4/3
decision_rule.INVALID: any G1-G6 gate failure (report, no ruling)
decision_rule.APPROVE: m*(K, r) > 4 at every committed series cell (K in {3, 36} x the full r grid) - mutually exclusive with REJECT via clause (b)
decision_rule.NULL: otherwise, on named axes: the r axis (no committed read-through measurement - cheapest live probe: the KDP series dashboard read-through report on the FIRST published pair, zero spend); the beta/KU axis; the delta fee axis; the EUR basis (NL packets price EUR 3.99/4.99 and assert '70% band respected' - band constants inherited, not re-verified). Every NULL a finalized citable finding with exact tables, never a re-run request
decision_rule.knife_edge_exclusion_gate: the decision evaluators receive an ENUMERATED input set (standalone bars, the m*(3, r) row, the m*(36, r) row); m*_inf values and the 11/10 comparison appear in NO clause - asserted structurally

gates.G1: twin arms: Arm B (per-mass ledger walk) == Arm A (closed forms) on every rational at all 15 (K, r) cells - full income, promo income, AND ratio (C1/C2/C3); C4 exact
gates.G2: T1: jump ratio == 2 exactly; forbidden-band width == lower edge exactly; attainable-set edges == {693/2000, 2093/2000, 2093/1000, 6993/1000}; roy(0.99) == 693/2000 (the V049 external anchor); every committed price in the upper branch
gates.G3: T2: m*(1) == 2 p/p0 at every committed price; the delta lemma strictly lowers the bar at every grid delta
gates.G4: T3: m* strictly decreasing in K and in r across the grid; m*(1, r) r-free; the K->inf closed form verified against the ladder (m*(36, 9/10) > m*_inf(9/10)); m*_inf(r*) == 2 exactly at r* = 400/899
gates.G6: battery: beta-monotonicity strict at every J with beta = 0 recovering the sales-only bar; census recount from the fixture's pinned copies reproduces 26/2/1; Arm R previews within 2% of the exact cohort mean (reporting sanity, no gate on decisions); census anchors reproduced verbatim

margin_ledger_registered_cells.band_width_margin0: forbidden-band width == its own lower edge EXACTLY (2093/2000 == 2093/2000)
margin_ledger_registered_cells.r_independence: m*(1, r) identical across the whole r grid (equality row)
margin_ledger_registered_cells.thin_cell_disclosed: m*(3, 1/2) = 3493/1695 = 2.0608 - ONE grid step above the clause-(b) witness line (clearance 0.0608, thin, disclosed; clause (b) is an EXISTENTIAL over the grid and fires at r in {3/4, 9/10})
margin_ledger_registered_cells.comp_cell_margin: m*(36, 3/4) = 1.2907 vs 4/3 - clearance approx 0.043, modest, disclosed
margin_ledger_registered_cells.knife_edge_excluded: m*_inf(9/10) vs 11/10 margin EXACTLY 91/90810 - registered, reported, and EXCLUDED from every decision clause
margin_ledger_registered_cells.home_ground_clearances: standalone bars 8.06/10.08/6.04 vs the >= 6 line - clearances 2.06/4.08/0.04; the 2.99 bar 598/99 = 6.0404 is a THIN clearance (0.0404), disclosed here (the band floor sits nearest the line)

controls_and_null_axes.r_axis: no committed read-through measurement exists - the grid brackets 1/10..9/10; the named zero-spend probe is the KDP series dashboard on the first published pair
controls_and_null_axes.beta_ku_axis: T5 monotone lemma is the decision content; J relative-pinned (KENP page counts uncommitted)
controls_and_null_axes.delta_fee_axis: signed lemma: delta > 0 hits the 70% side only, so the true bar is strictly BELOW 2 p/p0 - direction known, swept on the grid
controls_and_null_axes.eur_basis: NL packets price EUR 3.99/4.99 and assert '70% band respected' - the EUR band constants are inherited, not re-verified (named NULL axis; no EUR decision cell exists)

expected_landing_disclosed: REJECT on (a) AND (b) AND (c) at the drafter's exact values (50/50 drafting checks PASS, exit 0, ~0.4 s; twin-arm mismatches 0); the sim re-derives everything from scratch and must not trust these

battery.byte_identity: stdout + results.json byte-identical across two process runs (Arms A/B seedless exact Fraction arithmetic, platform-independent; Arm R pinned to the stated CPython minor)
battery.anomaly_census_convention: structured by disclosure coverage (V087-V090): compared-and-matched / compared-and-mismatched / not-disclosed(vacant); mismatches are first-class anomalies; exact rationals compared as Fraction VALUES with the spelling derived, never compared (the V090 session idea applied)
